perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair is standing in front of a display shelf with various vases; she has her arms crossed and looks annoyed/angry. A hand from the POV perspective tries to touch her shoulder, but she brusquely pulls away with a frown. (2) The scene shifts to an outdoor sidewalk at night where a hand is shown holding a yellow plastic cup of milk tea. (3) The woman is then shown sitting on a sofa, wrapped in a brown blanket. The POV hand presents the milk tea to her. (4) She takes a sip of the drink, and her expression immediately changes from a pout to a smile. She continues to drink happily while looking at the camera, eventually taking the hand of the person behind the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A loud, rhythmic Brazilian Funk (Funk Carioca) track with a heavy bassline and repetitive male vocal samples starts immediately. (2) The music continues at a constant high energy and volume throughout all scenes. (3) There are no audible environmental sounds or clear spoken dialogue from the main character, as the music dominates the entire soundscape.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook: 'POV 女友生氣的時候記得確認一個' (When your girlfriend gets mad, remember to check one thing). (2) Functional Translation: 'When your girlfriend gets mad'. (3) Instructional/Decorative Text: '✅今天有沒有喝手搖？' (Did she have hand-shaken tea today?). (4) Emotional Graphics: Three heart-eye emojis '🥰🥰🥰' appear as she smiles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Conflict (Girlfriend angry) -> Solution (Providing a drink) -> Resolution (Girlfriend happy)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character; 1 male hand visible from POV perspective.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a light-olive-colored ribbed long-sleeved top and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a retail display with vases; second is a tiled outdoor sidewalk at night; third is a home living room with a white sofa.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright indoor display lighting and ambient nighttime street lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a relatable and humorous relationship scenario where a girlfriend's anger is solved by a simple gesture (offering milk tea), playing on the stereotype that 'hangriness' or sugar cravings are common causes of irritability.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: POV camera perspective with text-based situational setups.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of aggressive Funk music contrasts with the domestic 'sweetness' of the resolution for comedic effect.
